member.name: T:NodeAddress
member.summary:
The metadata for a Node – including IP Address, and the crypto account associated with the Node.
See Hedera Documentation

member.name: M:NodeAddress.FromProtobuf(Proto.NodeAddress)
member.summary: Create a node from a protobuf.

member.name: P:NodeAddress.PublicKey
member.summary: The RSA public key of the node.

member.name: P:NodeAddress.Description
member.summary: A description of the node, with UTF-8 encoding up to 100 bytes.

member.name: P:NodeAddress.AccountId
member.summary: The account to be paid for queries and transactions sent to this node.

member.name: P:NodeAddress.Stake
member.summary: The amount of tinybars staked to the node.

member.name: P:NodeAddress.NodeId
member.summary: A non-sequential identifier for the node.

member.name: P:NodeAddress.CertHash
member.summary: A hash of the X509 cert used for gRPC traffic to this node.

member.name: P:NodeAddress.Addresses
member.summary: A node's service IP addresses and ports.
